rules.name: junior_position_strong
rules.prompt: Is this clearly a junior, entry-level, associate, new grad, or Software Engineer I role?

rules.name: experience_too_high
rules.prompt: Does this role clearly require more than 3 years of professional software engineering experience?

rules.name: frontend_primary_penalty
rules.prompt: Is this role primarily focused on frontend development such as React, UI work, styling, design systems, or client-side web development?

rules.name: backend_primary
rules.prompt: Is this role primarily focused on backend development, APIs, services, databases, business logic, or server-side systems?

rules.name: python_bonus
rules.prompt: Does this role explicitly use, require, or prefer Python?

rules.name: remote_preferred
rules.prompt: Is this a fully remote role within the United States?

inactive_rules.name: internship_role
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this an internship or co-op position rather than a full-time role?

inactive_rules.name: database_work
inactive_rules.prompt: Does the role involve working with databases (SQL or NoSQL)?

inactive_rules.name: non_software_role
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this NOT a software engineering role (e.g., IT support, QA tester without coding, analyst, etc.)?

inactive_rules.name: api_or_services_work
inactive_rules.prompt: Does the role involve building APIs, services, or backend systems?

inactive_rules.name: fullstack_backend_leaning
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this a full-stack role with a strong emphasis on backend work rather than frontend?

inactive_rules.name: contract_role
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this a contract or temporary role rather than full-time employment?

inactive_rules.name: senior_or_above
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this a senior, staff, principal, or lead role?

inactive_rules.name: devops_or_platform
inactive_rules.prompt: Is this primarily a DevOps, infrastructure, or platform engineering role rather than application development?
